title: helichrysum lacteum
intro: Helichrysum lacteum, also known as the broad-leaved helichrysum, is a perennial herb native to the Mediterranean region. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, making it a valuable resource in traditional medicine. The health benefits of Helichrysum lacteum include reducing inflammation and pain, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting the immune system, as well as its potential to aid in wound healing and skin conditions. Herbal preparations of Helichrysum lacteum can be found in the form of essential oils, teas, and infusions, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
